message:
feat(ci): add property testing workflow and region ops tests

CI/CD:
- .github/workflows/property-tests.yml: Property-based test workflow
- scripts/run_property_tests.sh: Test runner script

Tests:
- tests/property_region_ops.rs: Property tests for region operations

Also updates .beads/issues.jsonl with task progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,61 @@
+name: Property Tests
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/**'
+      - 'tests/**'
+      - 'scripts/**'
+      - 'Cargo.toml'
+      - 'Cargo.lock'
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/**'
+      - 'tests/**'
+      - 'scripts/**'
+      - 'Cargo.toml'
+      - 'Cargo.lock'
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 3 * * *'
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  RUST_LOG: info
+
+jobs:
+  property-tests:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        cases: [1000, 10000]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-proptest-${{ matrix.cases }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+
+      - name: Run property tests
+        env:
+          PROPTEST_CASES: ${{ matrix.cases }}
+          PROPTEST_SEED: ${{ github.run_id }}
+        run: ./scripts/run_property_tests.sh
+
+      - name: Upload proptest logs
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: proptest-logs-${{ matrix.cases }}
+          path: target/proptest-results/

@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+OUTPUT_DIR="${ROOT_DIR}/target/proptest-results"
+
+mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"
+
+TIMESTAMP="$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
+LOG_FILE="${OUTPUT_DIR}/proptest_${TIMESTAMP}.log"
+
+export RUST_LOG="${RUST_LOG:-info}"
+export RUST_BACKTRACE="${RUST_BACKTRACE:-1}"
+
+PROPTEST_SEED="${PROPTEST_SEED:-$(date +%s)}"
+PROPTEST_CASES="${PROPTEST_CASES:-1000}"
+PROPTEST_MAX_SHRINK_ITERS="${PROPTEST_MAX_SHRINK_ITERS:-100000}"
+
+export PROPTEST_CASES
+export PROPTEST_SEED
+export PROPTEST_MAX_SHRINK_ITERS
+export ASUPERSYNC_PROPTEST_SEED="${ASUPERSYNC_PROPTEST_SEED:-$PROPTEST_SEED}"
+export ASUPERSYNC_PROPTEST_MAX_SHRINK_ITERS="${ASUPERSYNC_PROPTEST_MAX_SHRINK_ITERS:-$PROPTEST_MAX_SHRINK_ITERS}"
+
+echo "==== Asupersync Property Test Suite ===="
+echo "Cases: ${PROPTEST_CASES}"
+echo "Seed:  ${PROPTEST_SEED}"
+echo "Log:   ${LOG_FILE}"
+echo ""
+
+set +e
+pushd "${ROOT_DIR}" >/dev/null
+cargo test --test algebraic_laws --test property_region_ops --test security/property_tests --all-features -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee "${LOG_FILE}"
+STATUS=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
+popd >/dev/null
+set -e
+
+if grep -q "FAILED" "${LOG_FILE}"; then
+    echo ""
+    echo "Property tests reported failures."
+    echo "Log: ${LOG_FILE}"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+if [ "${STATUS}" -ne 0 ]; then
+    echo ""
+    echo "Property test command failed."
+    echo "Log: ${LOG_FILE}"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+PASSED=$(grep -c "test .* ok" "${LOG_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+
+echo ""
+echo "✓ Property tests passed"
+echo "Total test functions: ${PASSED}"
+echo "Cases per test (requested): ${PROPTEST_CASES}"
+echo "Seed: ${PROPTEST_SEED}"
